description: Returns the [[Position|position]] of a location. If the location is attached to an object, that object's position is returned.
examples:
<sqf>
private _landLocation = locationPosition nearestLocation [[2915.2, 6164.52], "NameCityCapital"]; // "Agia Marina" [2915.2, 6164.52, -21.9009]
private _waterLocation = locationPosition nearestLocation [[2647.8799, 5989.9502], "NameMarine"]; // "Marina Bay" [2647.88, 5989.95, 0.0161484]
</sqf>
name: locationPosition

ret.desc: as locations are placed at Z = zero [[Position#PositionASL|ASL]] the returned Z is negative on land and around zero on water, see {{Link|#Example 3}}
